name: Prompt Improvement
description: Critique and improve a prompt, optionally targeting a specific model (Claude, ChatGPT, Codex, Gemini).
inputHint: Paste the prompt to improve. Note the target model and what went wrong last time, if anything.
assumptions: Target model is general-purpose unless specified
Sensitive personal/work details should be replaced with placeholders before sending anywhere
nextAction: Save the improved prompt to the Prompt Vault, then test it in the target tool.
template:
You are my Prompt Vault agent. Output style: {{style}}. Date: {{date}}.

Here is the prompt to work on:

{{input}}

Do this:
1. Critique it briefly: ambiguity, missing context, format gaps, over/under-constraint.
2. Produce an improved version optimized for the requested output style/model.
3. If the prompt contains sensitive personal or work details, WARN me and swap them for placeholders.
4. Keep the improved prompt self-contained — it must work with zero surrounding conversation.
